title.en: The Lord of the Shaking Mountain was extremely ...

content.en:
"Master, you can't spy on the future of a half-step transcendent realm legendary lord?"

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain was extremely shocked.

He is very clear about the strength and ability of the master.

Not to mention the Legendary Realm Lord, even if it is a peak Legendary Realm Lord of the same level, if the master wants to, he can also spy on the short future timeline, but the consumption is relatively large.

But why would a half-step transcendent realm legendary lord make it impossible for his master to snoop?

The white-bearded old man said: "There are several possibilities.one is that the Endless Lord has a special identity, and there is an eternal master who blocks his timeline, and the other is that the Endless Lord will inevitably become an eternal master in the future, and the future Endless Lord has paid a certain price to block his own timeline in the past, of course, there is a third possibility, that is, the Endless Lord has a treasure that can block the prying eyes of the timeline level." "

"Master, what do you think is the possibility?"

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain asked.

"There are three possibilities!" The white-bearded old man stroked his white beard and said, "No matter which one it is, it is enough to prove that the Endless Lord is extraordinary, and he controls time.

"The master is wise!"

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain patted his ass.

"Okay, you go guard the mountain. "

The white-bearded old man waved his hand and said.

"Yes, master!"

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain turned to leave, continuing to sit cross-legged at the entrance of Rising Sun Mountain, guarding the place.

......

There is no holy place.

Ye Tian was constantly browsing the records about the supreme technique, after all, the True Saintless Land was an incomparably ancient force, and many Legendary Realm Lords had been born in the past dynasties, and some had fallen, otherwise there were more than these Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land.

And over the years, these Legendary Realm Lords will also leave a lot of legacy, among which there are records of supreme skills.

Mastering time or space is the key or threshold to comprehending supreme skills.

Of course, if you only control one of them, you can create ordinary supreme skills at most, and only the peak legendary realm lord can create top supreme skills.

A peak Legendary Realm Lord who has mastered the top supreme skills can almost kill an ordinary Legendary Realm Lord in an instant, and the difference in strength is so big.

For example, the peak Legendary Realm Lord of the level of the White-bearded Old Man, all the Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Holy Land will be killed by the White-bearded Old Man in an instant, and the difference in strength is so terrifying.

Every Legendary Realm Lord wants to master a supreme skill as soon as possible, but it is still very difficult.

The supreme technique is the extreme use of time or space, and controlling time or space does not mean that you can completely exert the power of time or space to the extreme.

It's like a world where there is one of the strongest sword weapons, and if you get a sword weapon, you are in complete control of this sword weapon, and no one is your opponent, but can you really bring out the power of the sword weapon?

No, if you don't create a powerful sword technique that can bring out the use of the sword, you can only use the sword in a rough way, and the power is completely different.

It's the same with time and space, it's all clear, but it's very difficult to do.

"The biggest difference between me and the Legendary Realm Lords is that I have the Legendary Time Ancestral Endowment, while the Legendary Realm Lords don't have 'him!'"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, there are no ordinary Legendary Realm Lords, and even the White-bearded Old Man, the peak Legendary Realm Lord, does not have a Legendary-level Time Ancestor.

Having the legendary time ancestor is his hole card, his advantage.

Of course, he also needs to refer to the supreme skills of others, so that he can know the mysteries of supreme skills.

Some inheritances also have detailed descriptions of supreme skills, but after all, they are not real supreme technology inheritances, and there is no supreme technology inheritance, but there are traces of supreme skills between heaven and earth.

For example, the traces of the battlefield of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord.

Ye Tian had comprehended the traces of the Eternal Master's attack, but that grade was too high, and it was actually not suitable for Ye Tian.

"Let's go to some places where the battle traces of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord are. "

Ye Tian inquired and learned about a battlefield trace.

The immeasurable sea, the land of heavenly scars.

This is a battlefield trace formed after a short battle between the two peak Legendary Realm lords, and it is called the Land of Heavenly Scars.

Compared to the years, the traces here are a little dimmer.

When Ye Tian came here, he saw a trace of fist and sword collision, even the rules of the Infinite Sea could not erase this trace, at least it would take endless years to wipe it out.

At this time, many legendary lords here were contemplating, and Ye Tian did not attract anyone's attention when he came here.

He silently began his enlightenment here, and after about dozens of eternal years of enlightenment, he left.

In the following years, Ye Tian stepped into the land of the battlefield traces of the peak Legendary Realm lords, comprehended the battle traces of the Peak Legendary Realm lords, and comprehended the supreme technical mystery contained in them.

But after watching too much, Ye Tian stopped watching it, otherwise he would fall into a daze.

He already has a general idea of how the supreme technique is created, so he no longer needs to observe the supreme skill of others

Therefore, Ye Tian only needs to silently comprehend and create by himself now.

The years passed, ten million eternal years, twenty million eternal years......

Before you know it, 80 million eternal years have passed.

Finally on this day, Ye Tianming came to his senses.

Then, as he stood motionless for a long time, he stretched out a finger, and the power of time condensed into a drop of water, a drop of water condensed by the power of time.

I saw that this drop of water passed through everything in an instant, and the time dimension in front of me directly shattered and annihilated layer by layer, and this drop of water finally fell into the long river of time, and all the time dimensions along the way were shattered into nothingness.

"'This trick is called time dripping, although it is a very simple time supreme skill, but I have at least comprehended it. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Relying on the trick of Time Dripping, he was enough to kill a half-step Legendary Realm Lord.

Kill whom?

The white-bearded old man didn't say anything about killing anyone, nor did he say anything about killing doppelgangers, or killing other people's bodies.

However, he was still ready to kill a notorious half-step Legendary Realm Lord, and finding the other party's body could be regarded as a test.

For him, who controls time, he is looking for someone, almost no different from the lord of the legendary realm, and it is easy to find others. _
